scripts.build:js: npx terser assets/js/src/app.js assets/js/src/header.js assets/js/src/slider.js assets/js/src/filters.js assets/js/src/products.js assets/js/src/product-page.js assets/js/src/cart.js assets/js/src/checkout.js assets/js/src/notifications.js -o assets/js/dist/app.min.js -c -m
